## Objective

What outcome should this task produce?

## Context

Paste a concise summary using `docs/templates/session-summary-template.md` or link
the canonical requirement, design section, decision, issue, or pull request.
Conversation links are optional context and must not be the sole specification.

## Confirmed decisions

- None.

## Proposed ideas

- None.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ]
- [ ] Relevant validation passes.
- [ ] Canonical documentation and `docs/session-handoff.md` are current.

## Out of scope

State what this task should not change.

## Privacy and safety check

Confirm that this issue contains no secrets, credentials, private child
information, or raw production data.
